untranslatable_reason: Signal requires three non-technical data sources (fundamental supply/demand imbalance, psychological market tone, news event alignment, and news response magnitude) that are not available as quantitative indicators in the allowed indicator set. The fundamental confirmation, psychological tone assessment, and news event tracking cannot be operationalized with price/volume/technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Translated only the technical component (10-period MA momentum confirmation) which is operationalizable. The core signal requires external fundamental data (supply/demand imbalance evidence), sentiment/psychology data (news tone and market reaction), and news feed integration that are beyond the scope of price-action indicators. A complete implementation would require: (1) fundamental data source integration, (2) sentiment analysis pipeline for news events, (3) psychological tone classification system. Hold period capped at 3 bars per exit conditions. Trade frequency constraint (8-12/week) is a portfolio-level filter, not a rule-level condition.
